meaning: [空]旋翼机,一种早期直升飞机
examples: It is easy for families to run out of money before the weekly giro arrives.
My giro has not arrived this week.
You can pay the electricity bill by bank giro.
""The chest infection that caused his withdrawal from the Giro has responded to treatment and rest.
Vaughters was prepared to go out Wednesday night to celebrate the Giro win with friends.
